eql.name: updateStatusIfMatch

sql.name: getOrderStatistics
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(ACTUAL_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) = 101 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PENDING_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) = 201 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PAID_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) = 301 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SHIPPED_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) IN (401, 402) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS COMPLETED_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) IN (102, 103) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CANCELLED_COUNT FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getGoodsSalesRanking
sql.source: SELECT og.GOODS_ID AS GOODS_ID, og.GOODS_NAME AS GOODS_NAME, SUM(og.NUMBER) AS SALES_COUNT, SUM(og.PRICE * og.NUMBER) AS SALES_AMOUNT FROM litemall_order_goods og INNER JOIN litemall_order o ON o.ID = og.ORDER_ID WHERE CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(og.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(o.ORDER_STATUS AS INT) NOT IN (102, 103) AND o.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND o.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate} GROUP BY og.GOODS_ID, og.GOODS_NAME ORDER BY SALES_COUNT DESC LIMIT ${limit}

sql.name: getUserStatistics
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_USERS, SUM(CASE WHEN CREATE_TIME >= ${todayStart} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NEW_USERS_TODAY, SUM(CASE WHEN CREATE_TIME >= ${weekStart} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NEW_USERS_THIS_WEEK, SUM(CASE WHEN CREATE_TIME >= ${monthStart} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NEW_USERS_THIS_MONTH FROM nop_auth_user WHERE USER_TYPE = 1 AND CAST(DEL_FLAG AS INT) = 0 AND CREATE_TIME >= ${startDate} AND CREATE_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getDashboardGmv
sql.source: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ACTUAL_PRICE), 0) AS GMV, COUNT(*) AS ORDER_COUNT, COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) AS PAID_USER_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.USER_ID) FROM litemall_footprint f WHERE CAST(f.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND f.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND f.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS UV, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM litemall_aftersale a WHERE CAST(a.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(a.STATUS AS INT) = 3 AND a.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND a.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS RETURN_COUNT FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) >= 201 AND PAY_TIME >= ${startDate} AND PAY_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getPaidOrderPoints
getStockWarningList
sql.source: SELECT g.ID AS GOODS_ID, g.NAME AS GOODS_NAME, COALESCE(SUM(p.NUMBER), 0) AS TOTAL_STOCK FROM litemall_goods g LEFT JOIN litemall_goods_product p ON p.GOODS_ID = g.ID AND CAST(p.DELETED AS INT) = 0 WHERE CAST(g.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(g.IS_ON_SALE AS INT) = 1 GROUP BY g.ID, g.NAME HAVING COALESCE(SUM(p.NUMBER), 0) <= ${threshold} ORDER BY TOTAL_STOCK ASC LIMIT ${limit}

sql.name: getSalesFunnel
sql.source: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.GOODS_ID) FROM litemall_footprint f WHERE CAST(f.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND f.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND f.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS VIEW_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM litemall_cart c WHERE CAST(c.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND c.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND c.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS CART_COUNT, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(og.NUMBER), 0) FROM litemall_order_goods og INNER JOIN litemall_order o ON o.ID = og.ORDER_ID WHERE CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(og.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(o.ORDER_STATUS AS INT) NOT IN (102, 103) AND o.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND o.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS ORDER_COUNT, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(og.NUMBER), 0) FROM litemall_order_goods og INNER JOIN litemall_order o ON o.ID = og.ORDER_ID WHERE CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(og.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(o.ORDER_STATUS AS INT) >= 201 AND o.PAY_TIME >= ${startDate} AND o.PAY_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS PAY_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT USER_ID FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) >= 201 AND PAY_TIME >= ${startDate} AND PAY_TIME <= ${endDate} GROUP BY USER_ID HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ) rep) AS REPURCHASE_COUNT FROM (VALUES(0)) AS dummy(one)

sql.name: getCartRanking
getUnsalableGoods
getSoldGoodsCount
getOnSaleGoodsCount
sql.source:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM litemall_goods g WHERE CAST(g.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(g.IS_ON_SALE AS INT) = 1
AND g.CATEGORY_ID = ${categoryId}

sql.name: getGoodsSalesRankingByCategory
getUserPaymentSummaryInPeriod
sql.source: SELECT USER_ID, MIN(PAY_TIME) AS FIRST_PAY_TIME, MAX(PAY_TIME) AS LAST_PAY_TIME, COUNT(*) AS ORDER_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(ACTUAL_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) >= 201 AND PAY_TIME >= ${startDate} AND PAY_TIME <= ${endDate} GROUP BY USER_ID

sql.name: getUserPaymentSummaryAllTime
sql.source: SELECT USER_ID, MIN(PAY_TIME) AS FIRST_PAY_TIME, MAX(PAY_TIME) AS LAST_PAY_TIME, COUNT(*) AS ORDER_COUNT, 0 AS TOTAL_AMOUNT FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) >= 201 GROUP BY USER_ID

sql.name: getUserPaymentPoints
sql.source: SELECT USER_ID, PAY_TIME FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) >= 201 AND PAY_TIME >= ${startDate} AND PAY_TIME <= ${endDate} ORDER BY PAY_TIME ASC

sql.name: getAovDistribution
sql.source: SELECT SEGMENT AS SEGMENT, CNT AS ORDER_COUNT FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN ACTUAL_PRICE < 50 THEN '0-50' WHEN ACTUAL_PRICE < 100 THEN '50-100' WHEN ACTUAL_PRICE < 200 THEN '100-200' WHEN ACTUAL_PRICE < 500 THEN '200-500' ELSE '500+' END AS SEGMENT, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) >= 201 AND PAY_TIME >= ${startDate} AND PAY_TIME <= ${endDate} GROUP BY SEGMENT ) t

sql.name: getPaymentMethodShare
sql.source: SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(PAY_CHANNEL AS INT) = 1 THEN '微信支付' WHEN CAST(PAY_CHANNEL AS INT) = 2 THEN '余额支付' WHEN WALLET_PAY_AMOUNT > 0 THEN '混合支付' ELSE '其他' END AS METHOD, COUNT(*) AS ORDER_COUNT FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) >= 201 AND PAY_TIME >= ${startDate} AND PAY_TIME <= ${endDate} GROUP BY METHOD ORDER BY ORDER_COUNT DESC

sql.name: getReturnReasonShare
sql.source: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(REASON, ''), '未填写') AS REASON, COUNT(*) AS AFTERSALE_COUNT FROM litemall_aftersale WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(STATUS AS INT) >= 1 AND ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND ADD_TIME <= ${endDate} GROUP BY REASON ORDER BY AFTERSALE_COUNT DESC

sql.name: getCouponAnalysis
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CLAIMED_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(cu.STATUS AS INT) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS USED_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(cu.STATUS AS INT) = 1 THEN o.ACTUAL_PRICE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PULLED_GMV FROM litemall_coupon_user cu LEFT JOIN litemall_order o ON o.ID = cu.ORDER_ID AND CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 WHERE CAST(cu.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND cu.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND cu.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}
